text: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of State, Marco Rubio, to FOX: ‘What they [Iran] mean by opening the Strait of Hormuz is that yes, the Strait is open, as long as you coordinate with Iran and get our permission or we’ll blow you up, and you pay us. That’s not opening the Strait. Those are international waterways, they cannot normalize nor can we tolerate a system in which Iran decides who gets to use an international waterway and how much you have to pay them to use it.’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 美国国务卿马尔科·卢比奥对福克斯新闻表示：“他们（伊朗）所说的开放霍尔木兹海峡是指，是的，海峡是开放的，前提是你必须与伊朗协调并获得我们的许可，否则我们就炸毁你，而且你还得向我们付费。那不是开放海峡。那是国际水道，他们不能正常化，我们也不能容忍这样一种制度，即由伊朗决定谁可以使用国际水道，以及你必须支付多少钱才能使用它。” @Middle_East_Spectator

text: New attacks on Zawtar
text_zh: 对扎塔尔（Zawtar）的新袭击

text: Marco Rubio on Iran: Unfortunately, the hardliners with an apocalyptic vision of the future have the ultimate power in that country.
text_zh: 马尔科·卢比奥谈伊朗：不幸的是，在该国，拥有末日未来愿景的强硬派掌握着最终权力。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: Israeli security officials have proposed extending the special situation on the home front across the entire country until 7 May, citing continued fire from Lebanon and uncertainty over the ceasefire with Iran. The extension is subject to approval by the Knesset’s Foreign Affairs and Defence Committee. Officials assess a "high probability of further attacks on civilians." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：以色列安全官员提议将全国范围内的特殊局势延长至5月7日，理由是来自黎巴嫩的持续炮火以及与伊朗停火的不确定性。延期需经以色列议会外交与国防委员会批准。官员们评估认为“进一步袭击平民的可能性很高”。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated German Chancellor Friedrich Merz suggested that Kyiv may have to accept the loss of territory in a future peace agreement with Moscow. "At some point, Ukraine will sign a ceasefire agreement; at some point, we hope, a peace treaty with Russia. It may then turn out that part of Ukraine's territory is no longer Ukrainian." - he noted. https://www.reuters.com/world/europe/merz-suggests-ukraine-may-have-accept-territorial-loss-help-pave-way-eu-2026-04-27/ tweet
text_zh: 战争翻译 德国总理弗里德里希·默茨暗示，基辅在未来与莫斯科的和平协议中可能不得不接受领土损失。“在某个时候，乌克兰将签署停火协议；我们希望在某个时候签署与俄罗斯的和平条约。届时可能会发现，乌克兰的部分领土不再属于乌克兰。”——他指出。https://www.reuters.com/world/europe/merz-suggests-ukraine-may-have-accept-territorial-loss-help-pave-way-eu-2026-04-27/ 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 On Monday, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Russian President Putin held a meeting at the Kremlin. "We see how bravely and heroically the people of Iran are fighting for their independence and sovereignty," Putin noted. During the talks, Iranian FM Araghchi also declared that relations between Moscow and Tehran represent a strategic partnership and will continue to strengthen. The Russian president also told the Iranian official that he received a message from the Supreme Leader of Iran last week. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）🇷🇺 🇮🇷 周一，伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希与俄罗斯总统普京在克里姆林宫举行了会晤。普京指出：“我们看到伊朗人民为争取独立和主权而进行的英勇斗争。”在会谈中，伊朗外长阿拉格希还宣称，莫斯科与德黑兰之间的关系代表着战略伙伴关系，并将继续加强。俄罗斯总统还告诉这位伊朗官员，他上周收到了伊朗最高领袖的信息。推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli Defense Minister Katz: "There will not be a ceasefire in Lebanon alongside fire on our forces and on the Galilee. If the Lebanese government continues to shelter under Hezbollah, fire will come out and burn the cedars of Lebanon." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048787737348579514/photo/1 tweet

There will be no ceasefire in Lebanon, along with the launching of will ignite that will burn Lebanon's cedars. If the Lebanese Government continues under the shadow of Hezbollah, a fire will ignite that will burn Lebanon's cedars.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 以色列国防部长卡茨：纳伊姆·卡西姆在玩火，这把火将烧毁真主党和整个黎巴嫩。在黎巴嫩不会有停火，同时发射的炮火将点燃并烧毁黎巴嫩的雪松。如果黎巴嫩政府继续在真主党的阴影下，战火将会燃起并烧毁黎巴嫩的雪松。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 The United States is offering a reward of up to $10 million for information on Haydar Muzhir Ma’lak al‑Sa’idi (also known as Haydar al‑Gharawi), the leader and secretary general of Harakat Ansar Allah al‑Awfiya (HAAA), an Iran‑aligned milita group in Iraq. HAAA members have attacked U.S. diplomatic facilities in Iraq, as well as US military bases and personnel in Iraq, Jordan and Syria, killing U.S. service members. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 美国悬赏最高1000万美元，征集有关海达尔·穆兹希尔·马拉克·萨伊迪（Haydar Muzhir Ma’lak al‑Sa’idi，又名海达尔·加拉维 Haydar al‑Gharawi）的信息。他是伊拉克境内亲伊朗民兵组织“真主忠诚者运动”（Harakat Ansar Allah al‑Awfiya，简称HAAA）的领导人兼秘书长。HAAA成员曾袭击过美国驻伊拉克外交设施，以及美国在伊拉克、约旦和叙利亚的军事基地和人员，导致美军士兵死亡。 @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Hezbollah has activated martyrdom squads in Israeli-occupied areas of southern Lebanon, deploying fighters for direct hand-to-hand combat with Israeli forces using 1980s-style tactics. A Hezbollah military commander stated that large groups of "martyrdom" fighters have been deployed across occupied southern Lebanese territory according to pre-planned maps, with their mission being direct engagement with Israeli officers and soldiers to prevent Israel from establishing control on Lebanese soil. The move comes after Israel deployed five divisions into southern Lebanon (the 36th, 91st, 98th, 146th, and 162nd) with the stated goal of destroying buildings near the border and pushing Hezbollah north of the Litani River. Despite Trump's ceasefire announcement and multiple extensions, Israel has continued strikes almost daily, with the casualty toll rising to 2,491 killed and 7,719 wounded since fighting resumed on March 2. Hezbollah dismissed the ceasefire extension as "meaningless" in light of Israel's continued attacks. On April 26 alone, Israeli strikes killed 14 people in southern Lebanon, including two women and two children. Israel claims it maintains "full freedom of action" and is only responding to ceasefire violations. Hezbollah is shifting tactics, from long-range strikes to close-quarters combat in occupied territory. The 1980s playbook is back: ambushes, IEDs, hand-to-hand engagement. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 真主党已在以色列占领的黎巴嫩南部地区启动了“殉道者”小队，部署武装人员使用20世纪80年代风格的战术与以色列军队进行直接肉搏战。一名真主党军事指挥官表示，根据预先规划的地图，大批“殉道者”战士已被部署到被占领的黎巴嫩南部领土，其任务是与以色列军官和士兵直接交战，以阻止以色列在黎巴嫩土地上建立控制权。此举发生在该国部署了五个师（第36、91、98、146和162师）进入黎巴嫩南部之后，其既定目标是摧毁边境附近的建筑物并将真主党推至利塔尼河以北。尽管特朗普宣布了停火并多次延长，但以色列几乎每天都在继续袭击，自3月2日战斗恢复以来，伤亡人数已升至2491人死亡，7719人受伤。鉴于以色列的持续袭击，真主党认为停火延期“毫无意义”。仅4月26日，以色列的袭击就在黎巴嫩南部造成14人死亡，其中包括两名妇女和两名儿童。以色列声称其保持“完全的行动自由”，并仅对违反停火的行为作出回应。真主党正在改变战术，从远程打击转向占领区内的近距离作战。20世纪80年代的剧本回归了：伏击、简易爆炸装置（IED）、肉搏战。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ОРИЕНТАРЬ: 📝 Ищем путь к миру 📝 После Пакистана и Омана глава иранского МИД добрался и до России . Аббас Арагчи посетил Санкт-Петербург , где встретился с российским президентом Владимиром Путиным . 🔻 О чем говорили? ▪️ Обсудили возможные пути прекращения огня и снижения напряженности в регионе, а также провал переговоров с США . Вину Арагчи возложил на американцев, выдвинувших чрезмерные требования к иранской стороне. ▪️ Подняли вопрос защиты судоходства в Ормузском проливе . ▪️ Обменялись заверениями о взаимной поддержке: Владимир Путин подтвердил, что Россия сделает все возможное для скорейшей стабилизации обстановки в регионе, а Арагчи передал президенту РФ личное послание от верховного лидера Ирана Моджтабы Хаменеи . 🖍 Похоже, что иранцы рассматривают руководство России как возможного посредника в диалоге с властями США . Об этом говорит и маршрут поездки Арагчи : в прошлом власти Омана не раз выступали медиатором в конфликтах республики с США , а теперь в этот процесс вовлечены и пакистанцы. ❗️ Причем теперь посредничество властей России уже не выглядит столь маловероятным, как прежде: американцы, на фоне развязанного ими кризиса, вполне могут учесть позицию государства, играющего весомую роль на мировом рынке нефти. И частичное снятие антироссийских санкций — косвенное тому подтверждение. #Иран #Россия #США 🧨 @rybar_mena — о ближневосточном хаосе с любовью 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ОРИЕНТАРЬ： 📝 寻找和平之路 📝 在访问巴基斯坦和阿曼后，伊朗外交部长抵达俄罗斯。阿巴斯·阿拉格希访问了圣彼得堡，并会见了俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京。 🔻 谈话内容？ ▪️ 讨论了实现停火和降低地区紧张局势的可能途径，以及与美国谈判的失败。阿拉格希将责任归咎于美国人，称他们对伊朗方面提出了过分要求。 ▪️ 提出了保护霍尔木兹海峡航运的问题。 ▪️ 双方交换了相互支持的保证：弗拉基米尔·普京重申，俄罗斯将尽一切可能尽快稳定该地区局势，而阿拉格希则向俄罗斯总统转达了伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊的亲笔信。 🖍 看来伊朗人正在考虑将俄罗斯领导层作为与美国当局对话的潜在调解人。阿拉格希的行程也证明了这一点：过去，阿曼当局曾多次在伊朗与美国的冲突中担任调解人，而现在巴基斯坦人也参与了这一进程。 ❗️ 此外，俄罗斯当局的调解现在看起来不再像以前那样不可能：在美国引发的危机背景下，他们很可能会考虑在世界石油市场上发挥重要作用的国家的立场。部分解除对俄制裁就是间接证明。 #伊朗 #俄罗斯 #美国 🧨 @rybar_mena — 带着爱关注中东乱局 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇮🇱 🇷🇺 Reuters: If Israel allows for a vessel loaded with grain from Russian occupied Ukrainian territory to dock at the Port of Haifa, they risk diplomatic and legal responses from Ukraine. A Ukrainian official said that Ukraine will not tolerate the laundering of stolen goods. "If this ship and its cargo isn't rejected, we reserve the right to deploy a full suite ​of diplomatic and international legal responses. The ⁠practice of laundering stolen goods is unacceptable, and Israel has essentially ​shrugged off our demands regarding the ​previous ⁠vessel.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇮🇱 🇷🇺 路透社：如果以色列允许一艘装载着来自俄罗斯占领的乌克兰领土谷物的船只在海法港停靠，他们将面临来自乌克兰的外交和法律回应。一位乌克兰官员表示，乌克兰绝不容忍洗钱赃物。“如果这艘船及其货物不被拒绝，我们保留采取全套外交和国际法律回应的权利。洗钱赃物的做法是不可接受的，而以色列基本上对我们关于前一艘船只的要求置之不理。” @wfwitness

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Hezbollah published footage from the strike with an FPV drone targeting IDF's UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter and a group of Israeli soldiers conducting MEDEVAC in the Lebanese village of Taybeh on Sunday. The drone made an impact a few meters away from intended targets. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2048785932183069132/video/1 The moment when an FPV drone operated by Hezbollah hit a group of Israeli soldiers loading wounded into the UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter near the village of Taybeh in southern Lebanon earlier on Sunday. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2048497772739846311/video/1 - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet

Rubio on the White House Correspondents' Dinner: "It was sort of an unfortunate situation that happened there, where one individual can disrupt what is one of the bigger nights in Washington, especially when the President attends." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048783831453348027/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Melania Trump: Kimmel’s hateful and violent rhetoric is intended to divide our country. His monologue about my family isn’t comedy, his words are corrosive and deepens the political sickness within America. People like Kimmel shouldn’t have the opportunity to enter our homes each evening to spread hate. A coward, Kimmel hides behind ABC because he knows the network will keep running cover to protect him. Enough is enough. It is time for ABC to take a stand. How many times will ABC’s leadership enable Kimmel’s atrocious behavior at the expense of our community. First Lady Melania Trump on Jimmy Kimmel: "Time for ABC to take a stand." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：梅拉尼娅·特朗普：坎摩尔充满仇恨和暴力的言论旨在分裂我们的国家。他关于我家庭的独白不是喜剧，他的话语具有腐蚀性，加深了美国内部的政治疾病。像坎摩尔这样的人不应该有机会每天晚上进入我们的家传播仇恨。坎摩尔是个懦夫，他躲在ABC背后，因为他知道该电视网会继续掩护他。够了就是够了。是时候让ABC表明立场了。ABC的领导层还要多少次以牺牲我们的社区为代价来纵容坎摩尔的恶劣行为。第一夫人梅拉尼娅·特朗普谈吉米·坎摩尔：“是时候让ABC表明立场了。” - 开源情报推文

text: NEW: FPV drone strike by Hezbollah hit an Israeli soldier standing near a Merkava Mk.4M tank. Reports say 1 IDF soldier was killed and 6 others injured. The drone appears to have gone unnoticed until impact.
text_zh: 最新：真主党发动的FPV无人机袭击击中了一名站在梅卡瓦Mk.4M坦克附近的以色列士兵。据报道，1名以色列国防军士兵死亡，另有6人受伤。无人机似乎在撞击前未被察觉。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio rejected Iran’s conditions for opening the Strait of Hormuz, following U.S. President Trump’s cancellation of planned talks in Islamabad. “If what they (Iran) mean by ‘opening the straits’ is: ‘Yes, the straits are open, as long as you coordinate with Iran, get our permission, or we’ll blow you up, and you pay us’ – that is not opening the straits. Those are international waterways. They cannot normalise – nor can we tolerate them trying to normalise – a system in which the Iranians decide who gets to use an international waterway and how much you have to pay.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国务卿马可·卢比奥拒绝了伊朗关于开放霍尔木兹海峡的条件，此前美国总统特朗普取消了原定在伊斯兰堡举行的会谈。“如果他们（伊朗）所说的‘开放海峡’是指：‘是的，海峡是开放的，只要你与伊朗协调，获得我们的许可，否则我们就炸毁你们，而且你们要付钱给我们’——那不是开放海峡。那是国际水道。他们不能使这种制度正常化——我们也不能容忍他们试图使这种制度正常化——即由伊朗人决定谁可以使用国际水道，以及你必须付多少钱。” @wfwitness

text: A second Russian ship (PANORMITIS) carrying suspected stolen Ukrainian grain is nearing Haifa Port, after a similar ship (ABINSK) already docked, unloaded, and left earlier in April. Ukraine says the grain comes from occupied territories (via Russia). Israel previously took no action on the first ship. At least four shipments of stolen Ukrainian grain have already been unloaded in Israel in 2026 alone. Profits flow back to Russia, financing the war effort. Israeli grain buyers have reportedly purchased this grain knowingly. Source: Kateryna Yaresko, Myrotvorets Center
text_zh: 第二艘载有疑似被盗乌克兰谷物的俄罗斯船只（PANORMITIS）正在接近海法港，此前一艘类似的船只（ABINSK）已于4月初停靠、卸货并离开。乌克兰称这些谷物来自被占领土（经由俄罗斯）。以色列此前未对第一艘船采取任何行动。仅在2026年，至少已有四批被盗的乌克兰谷物在以色列卸货。利润流回俄罗斯，资助战争。据报道，以色列谷物买家明知这些谷物来源。来源：Kateryna Yaresko，Myrotvorets中心

text: Agusta-Bell AB-205 helicopter of the Hellenic Air Force made an emergency landing in Crete this morning "due to a technical malfunction."

text: Germany's Merz on Ukraine: Ukraine feels like a European country. It is a European country. The European Union must not become an exclusive club. We must not lose Ukraine to Russia—not even in a perceived, emotional sense. Accession to the European Union always takes a very long time. But be careful not to raise hopes too high, which will then be followed by disappointment. At some point, there will be a ceasefire… and possibly parts of Ukraine will no longer be Ukrainian. We cannot say, ‘Someday you might be allowed to come.’ The steps must be credible, irreversible, and lead ultimately to membership. That will take time—but we must begin.
text_zh: 德国的默茨谈乌克兰：乌克兰感觉像是一个欧洲国家。它就是一个欧洲国家。欧盟绝不能成为一个排他的俱乐部。我们绝不能失去乌克兰，不能让它落入俄罗斯之手——即使是在感知上或情感上也不行。加入欧盟总是需要很长时间。但要小心，不要抱有太高的期望，否则随之而来的将是失望。在某个时刻，将会实现停火……而乌克兰的部分地区可能将不再属于乌克兰。我们不能说‘总有一天你可能会被允许加入’。这些步骤必须是可信的、不可逆转的，并最终导向成员国资格。这需要时间——但我们必须开始。

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ "We see how courageously and heroically they fight" : Putin expresses strong hope that Iran will overcome this difficult period of trials under the leadership of its new Supreme Leader and achieve lasting peace — DD Geopolitics on X 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: I love when Israelis are very honest ❗️ Israeli Minister of War Katz told the UN coordinator for Lebanon today that Israel has genocidal intent against Lebanon and that: "Israeli fire will burn the cedars of Lebanon." "The fire will burn Hezbullah and all of Lebanon," he added ✍ I wonder of sham the Nuremberg trials were when they decided to kill the German leadership over claims of vague genocidal intent, when Israelis have been very consistent and clear about seeking genocide
text_zh: 我喜欢以色列人非常诚实的时候 ❗️ 以色列战争部长卡茨今天对联合国驻黎巴嫩协调员表示，以色列对黎巴嫩有种族灭绝意图，并称：“以色列的炮火将焚烧黎巴嫩的雪松。”他补充说：“战火将烧毁真主党和整个黎巴嫩。” ✍ 我想知道，当纽伦堡审判以模糊的种族灭绝意图为由处决德国领导层时，那场审判是多么虚伪，而以色列人对于寻求种族灭绝的意图却一直非常一致且明确。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from АФРИКАРЬ: 📝 Семь бед — один ответ 📝 Французы хотят заставить пожалеть о выгнанных контингентах Пока в Мали гремели выстрелы, французские СМИ на удивление мало распространяли фейки от боевиков и в принципе сухо комментировали боевую обстановку. Связано это с тем, что у них была более глобальная информационная задача — привязать развернувшийся кризис к нарративу «возвращения Франции в Сахель». Не успела проясниться картина вокруг Кидаля и Гао, как французы один за одним начали выкатывать материалы в стиле «на подумать» . Jeune Afrique , например, выложили длиннопост о том, что французы чуть ли не «объединяют» под своим крылом всю Африку. Журналисты из Africa Intelligence решили намекнуть более прозрачно — в своей свежей статье они сочинили тираду «усилиям Франции» в борьбе с боевиками в Бенине и даже в Нигерии . ❗️ В ближайшие недели таких материалов будет только больше, и их вслед за профильными изданиями подхватят и крупные СМИ. Первоочередная задача западной пропаганды — выставить в плохом свете сахельскую деятельность российских игроков и вернуть к жизни чучело приказавшей долго жить французской «архитектуры безопасности» в Западной Африке. #Сахель #Франция 💀 @rybar_africa — там, где политика горячее экватора 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 АФРИКАРЬ： 📝 七灾一策 📝 法国人想让人为被驱逐的特遣队感到遗憾。当马里枪声不断时，法国媒体出奇地少传播武装分子的假消息，原则上对战斗局势的评论也很干瘪。这是因为他们有一个更宏大的信息任务——将爆发的危机与“法国重返萨赫勒”的叙事联系起来。基达尔和加奥周围的情况还没理清，法国人就一个接一个地抛出“引人深思”的材料。例如，《青年非洲》发布了一篇长文，称法国几乎是在其羽翼下“统一”了整个非洲。来自《非洲情报》的记者决定暗示得更明显一些——在他们最新的一篇文章中，他们编造了一篇关于“法国在贝宁甚至尼日利亚打击武装分子的努力”的演说。 ❗️ 在接下来的几周里，此类材料只会越来越多，继专业刊物之后，大型媒体也会跟进。西方宣传的首要任务是抹黑俄罗斯参与者在萨赫勒地区的活动，并复活那个早已名存实亡的法国在西非的“安全架构”稻草人。 #萨赫勒 #法国 💀 @rybar_africa — 政治比赤道更火热的地方 💸 支持我们

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Embassy in Baghdad has released a statement offering up to a $10 million reward for information on Haydar Muzhir Ma'lak al-Sa'idi, the Secretary General of Harakat Ansar Allah al-Awfiya (HAAA), an Iranian-backed militia group in Iraq. The U.S. has increasingly pressured the Iraqi government to reign in such groups as the Iraqi government faces an impasse over the formation of a government, as they struggle to balance both Iranian and U.S. interests within the country. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国驻巴格达大使馆发表声明，悬赏最高 1000 万美元征集有关 Haydar Muzhir Ma'lak al-Sa'idi 的信息，他是伊拉克伊朗支持的民兵组织“真主卫士运动”（HAAA）的秘书长。随着伊拉克政府在组建政府问题上陷入僵局，且难以平衡国内的伊朗和美国利益，美国正日益向伊拉克政府施压，要求其控制此类组织。推文
